rationale: The cited paper appears as a single grouped parenthetical reference in a sentence that points readers to a review of regulatory fit findings. In the citing article, the substantive theoretical and empirical support for the argument is carried by other specific studies (e.g., Cesario et al. 2004; Hong and Lee 2008), while Aaker and Lee (2006) is used as a general background pointer. There is no distinct use of this specific paper for hypothesis derivation, method choice, measurement, or result interpretation.
